description: Set up accounts (1Password, email, Slack, Notion, Zoom, Linear). Read handbook (company-wide onboarding, time off policy, code of conduct, employee referral program). Watch onboarding videos/bootcamps. Complete Linear tasks for Day 1 and Week 1. Set up team@growthxlab.com email. Prepare 1-line intro (name, location, fun fact) for next all-hands.
